Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: She aims a rather suspicious squint your way. But what else can you say?

Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: You can't even justify your social ineptitude to yourself. It just seemed right to do in the moment. Like it'd match her vibe.

Line.Text: You wouldn't want this baddie to think that you're a poser or something, right?
